---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve the game
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Browser:** (e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121)
- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 14, Windows 11)
- **Game version:** (shown in the bottom status bar)
- **Suite tier:** (Starter / Standard / Professional / Enterprise)

## Game state

- **Sandbox mode:** Yes / No
- **Demo mode:** Yes / No
- **Approximate tick count:** (shown in the status bar)

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here. Console errors, save file exports, or specific game configurations are especially helpful.
